9844701.title: Alliance Graphique Internationale

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: International organization of graphic artists and designers

9844701.description: International organization of graphic artists and designers
9844701.extract: Alliance Graphique Internationale (AGI) is a membership-based association of the world's leading graphic artists and designers. Some of its members have been responsible for the identity design of some of the world's top corporations and institutions, and created numerous examples of globally known packaging, publications, illustration and poster designs.
